creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
Created attachment 216490
net-im/py-matrix-synapse: 1.15.2 -> 1.17.0

This patch updates net-im/py-matrix-synapse from 1.15.2 to 1.17.0, which includes mostly bugfixes and a few minor feature changes (see [1], [2]).

The patch bumps the port's version and updates the dependencies in accordance with synapse's python_dependencies.py. I've also taken the opportunity to redo the dependencies patch w/ make makepatch.

portlint: "OK" (3 Warnings, none new)
testport: OK (poudriere: 121amd64)
do-test: OK (Ran 1101 tests in 336.962s, PASSED (skips=5, successes=1096))

I've been running the resulting package on my server since yesterday and things appear to work fine. :)

Cheers,
Sascha

[1] https://github.com/matrix-org/synapse/releases/tag/v1.16.0
[2] https://github.com/matrix-org/synapse/releases/tag/v1.17.0
